title: rubus × bortensis
intro: Rubus × bortensis, also known as the raspberry-leaved blackberry, is a hybrid of the raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × bortensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
